compactionControl.summaryPrompt: Summarize this Singularity Works forge session. MANDATORY SECTIONS: (1) Forge battery status (X/49 FP FN), (2) forge_context.py and module changes made, (3) any RED assurance findings with file paths and requirement text, (4) git commits made this session with hashes, (5) open seams and P0/P1 items remaining. Do NOT collapse security evidence into generic summaries. Preserve all specific finding codes, requirement IDs, and verdict statuses.
